strengths: Over 15 years of diverse, hands-on software engineering experience across multiple domains.
Demonstrates entrepreneurial spirit and leadership through founding an open-source project (GISCollective).
Recent experience in AI agent infrastructure, showing a pivot towards relevant technologies.
concerns: Lacks experience at the Director/Principal level; highest title is Staff Engineer.
Resume focuses on implementation ('software craftsman') rather than high-level technical strategy.
AI and cloud experience appears to be at the application level, not deep platform strategy.
response.justification: Bogdan possesses a strong and extensive technical background that meets the minimum years of experience. His entrepreneurial work on GISCollective and recent foray into AI are commendable. However, there is a significant disconnect between his experience as a hands-on Staff Engineer and the director-level strategic responsibilities of this Principal role. The resume does not provide evidence of defining large-scale technical strategy, advising senior leadership, or holding the recognized AI expertise required for this position.
